name: 19th Hole
about: The 19th Hole is an all-ages entertainment destination in Mokena offering indoor golf and multisport simulation. It features nine Full Swing simulator bays with infrared tracking and ION3 camera technology for real-time ball flight data, allowing play on 63 virtual courses and 13 interactive sports. The venue is designed as a year-round alternative to outdoor golf, complemented by food, beverages, and a full bar to enhance the experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing technology trusted by PGA professionals for realistic gameplay
Year-round access with 9 simulator bays, turning the golf season from 180 to 365 days
Multisport options for group competition beyond golf, including baseball, football, and hockey

food_and_drink.notes: Wide variety of food including appetizers, sandwiches, and entrees available for play or after rounds
Fully stocked bar with adult beverages, no BYOB mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium infrared tracking technology with real-time ball flight data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own clubs and equipment for simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full bar and food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes take about 2-3 hours depending on player skill and simulator wait times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The 19th Hole is an all-ages entertainment destination suitable for families and kids.
